package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtSprintfFloatToString() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_sprintf_float_to_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%f\", ...)` instead of `strconv.FormatFloat(...)` when only a float string is needed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
